properties.dose: Oral Threshold 5-7mg Light: 13-15mg Common: 15-25mg Strong: 25mg+ | Vapourized Threshold: ~1mg Light: 1-5mg Common: 5-8mg Strong: 8-12mg+
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: An obscure psychedelic drug similar in structure to 5-MeO-DMT. The drug is suspected to be first synthesised by Alexander Shulgin. The drug is likely to have similar effects to other psychedelic tryptamines.
